calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-02-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Present: Petitioner Michael Brown; Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; Reporter: Valerie Papale. Petitioner was sworn and testified. Upon good cause shown, the Court ordered that Petitioner's name be changed from Michael Brown to Jeremiah Silver. (D. 505)
